saga.name: The Violet-Flora Strata
saga.description: A sudden biological re-coding within the Southern-Verdant-Buffer has introduced an invasive, purple-pigmented phenotype. These humanoid-patterned growths are disrupting the local ecological-registry, forcing the Atlas Confederation to deploy field agents to stabilize the terraforming-layers before the shift becomes permanent.

instance.name: The Violet-Flora Strata
instance.description: A sudden biological re-coding within the Southern-Verdant-Buffer has introduced an invasive, purple-pigmented phenotype. These humanoid-patterned growths are disrupting the local ecological-registry, forcing the Atlas Confederation to deploy field agents to stabilize the terraforming-layers before the shift becomes permanent.

maps.name: Athel-Ferrum Outpost
maps.description: A dense, multicultural settlement serving as the Atlas Confederation's primary monitoring station for the adjacent bio-zones, where commerce and heavy-duty security intersect.

maps.name: Verdant Buffer Zone
maps.description: A fortified transition corridor where Atlas security forces attempt to regulate the creeping, unprogrammed expansion of the unmapped flora.

maps.name: Amethyst Foliage Expanse
maps.description: The deep interior of the forest, characterized by dense, violet-hued growth and the presence of divergent humanoids with chromatic skin shifts.

maps.name: Sap-Logic Array
maps.description: A cluster of decommissioned environmental-control hardware where physical biological growth has become inseparable from the underlying utility-infrastructure.

maps.name: The Bloom Apex
maps.description: A massive, hyper-accelerated growth site where the physical landscape and the maintenance-layer have merged into a single, unmapped terrain.

quests.title: The Buffer Drift Survey
quests.description: The Verdant Buffer Zone is experiencing heavy biological saturation. The Atlas Confederation requires an immediate audit of the local flora to determine if the Instance-Physical entanglement is stabilizing.

steps.description: Consult with the sector's lead environmental surveyor.
Gather samples of the anomalous growth for analysis.

quests.title: Knot-Node Neutralization
quests.description: The saturation has coalesced into humanoid-shaped entities. These mutagens are tethering themselves to the physical layer via biological nodes. Neutralize the manifestations to prevent further entanglement.

steps.description: Engage and neutralize the mutated humanoid entities.
Recover the central growth nodes from the neutralized entities.

quests.title: Perimeter Hardening
quests.description: Atlas security is deploying reinforced bark-composite plating to stabilize the boundary. Scavenge the necessary materials from recent combat zones to assist in the deployment.

steps.description: Collect discarded plating from the skirmish sites.

quests.title: The Bloom Reclamation
quests.description: The source of the encroachment is a central anomaly at the Bloom Apex. We must reclaim the core to restore the ecological parameters of the zone.

steps.description: Eliminate the primary mutagenic manifestation at the center of the anomaly.

dialogues.speaker: Jiro Samsara-Lin
dialogues.text: Surveyor's badge still works, just. If you're here to help the buffer, I can use the extra eyes.

dialogues.speaker: Elara Vossen-Khyber
dialogues.text: The canopy's tint is shifting again. Watch your step near the root-works.

dialogues.speaker: Kaelen Thon-Zheng
dialogues.text: Atlas is watching the borders. Don't get caught in the swell.

dialogues.speaker: Knot-Node Terminal
dialogues.text: ENV-CONTROL NODE ONLINE. Biological interference detected on junction array. Awaiting suppression directive.

dialogues.speaker: Jiro Samsara-Lin
dialogues.text: The arboreal canopy is losing its hue. We need to map the extent of this chromatic drift before the greenery is lost entirely.

dialogues.speaker: jiro-samsara-lin
dialogues.text: The survey is done. The somatic shift is more widespread than the Atlas edicts suggested. It's not just the leaves; it's the roots themselves.

dialogues.speaker: Aris Thorne-Mbeki
dialogues.text: The violet-skinned ones have anchored themselves to the junction points. They're strangling the flow of the canopy-ways.

dialogues.speaker: Solis Val-D'souza
dialogues.text: The encroachment is pushing too close to the settlement. We need to reinforce the biological boundary lines.

dialogues.speaker: Rina Okafor-Voss
dialogues.text: The forest is choking. We have to clear the violet-drifters and restore the original growth patterns.

item.description: A high-level ecological-registrar with skin stained by violet-spore exposure; she manages the biological records of the buffer-zone.
A veteran Atlas-security-contractor specialized in managing non-compliant botanical-growth.
A pneumatic tool designed to drive off aggressive, mutagen-heavy vegetation with high-pressure bursts.
A tactical adjustment that mimics the biological signature of the local violet-flora.
A dense, pulsating mass of purple-pigmented biomass that obstructs navigation through the undergrowth.
A viscous, violet fluid harvested from the rogue biomass, used in improvised biological stabilizers.
Protective gear fashioned from the hardened, indigo-hued stems of the local flora.
Standard Atlas-sanctioned credit chit accepted across the outpost's vendors and contractors.
Elara Vossen-Khyber, the Atlas perimeter officer overseeing the reinforcement of the buffer's boundary lines.
Kaelen Thon-Zheng, a border-watch fabricator who barters reclaimed bark-composite gear for salvage.
A decommissioned environmental-control terminal at the Sap-Logic Array, now the interface for coordinating node neutralization.

skills.name: Spore Suppression Volley
skills.description: Fires a suppressant projectile in the direction of the tap. Spawn chance and lifetime scale with Intelligence and Range.
